reason: Command/Group/Context is the runtime spine from declaration to callback and cleanup.
questions: Why does Click use explicit Command/Group/Context instead of a parser-only API?
How do Context and resource cleanup constrain extensions?

reason: The parameter pipeline turns argv/environment/default/prompt input into typed callback values.
questions: Why is parsing split from Parameter and ParamType?

reason: Help, prompt, output, progress and streams expose the same command metadata to humans and CI.

How do TTY/non-TTY and resource boundaries affect the public CLI experience?
